text:
(Me correcting patches yet again)
It's better to define ISPELL_FILES using $DISTNAME which will not be change by slave ports: new patch attached.

While here I should suggest that someone should update contrib/spell in base.


      Posta, news, sport, oroscopo: tutto in una sola pagina. 
Crea l'home page che piace a te!
